untranslatable_reason: Cup-with-Handle is a complex multi-bar pattern requiring shape recognition (U-shaped valley detection, handle flag formation, multi-candle sequence analysis) that cannot be expressed using only point-in-time indicators and basic mathematical operators. The signal requires: (1) identification of a valley formation over 10-20+ bars, (2) detection of a specific consolidation flag pattern, (3) confirmation of horizontal price movement, and (4) sequential validation of pattern geometry. These require pattern matching logic beyond simple indicator thresholds.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic approximation: entry uses price breakout above pivot (representing old high) with volume confirmation, exit on pivot break below. However, this loses the core pattern recognition requirement of the cup-with-handle formation. A proper implementation would require a dedicated pattern recognition engine or custom ML-based candle sequence detector.
